{"cards": [{"name": "Ember Striker", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Goblin Warrior", "oracle_text": "Haste
Menace", "flavor_text": "Strike fast, strike twice, ask questions later.", "power": "2", "toughness": "1", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Aggressive 2-drop with haste and menace. P+T = 3 equals CMC, which follows common creature guidelines. Two keywords make it interesting without being complex. Menace pairs well with haste for aggressive strategies."}, {"name": "Skyfire Tyrant", "mana_cost": "{5}{R}{R}", "cmc": 7, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Dragon", "oracle_text": "Flying, trample, haste
Whenever ~ attacks, it deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker.
{R}{R}: ~ gets +2/+0 until end of turn.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "6", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Splashy mythic Dragon with multiple abilities. Flying/trample/haste baseline, attack trigger for battlefield control, and activated ability for burst damage. At 7 mana, it's expensive enough to be fair but impactful enough to be mythic-worthy."}, {"name": "Seek the Wilds", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "Every path leads somewhere. The wise choose their destination.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple ramp spell testing library search templating. Puts land into play tapped to avoid being too powerful at common. Standard 2-mana ramp effect following established patterns like Rampant Growth."}, {"name": "Ironbark Behemoth", "mana_cost": "{4}{G}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature — Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "Its footsteps echo like thunder, reshaping the very landscape in its wake.", "power": "5", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Large common creature testing power/toughness ceiling. P+T = 9 vs CMC = 5, so P+T exceeds CMC+3 by 1, which is acceptable for a single keyword. Trample is appropriate for large green creatures and helps it connect with opponents."}, {"name": "Verdant Awakening", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment", "oracle_text": "Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, you gain 1 life.
{G}, Sacrifice ~: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "Nature rewards those who tend to its growth.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Multi-ability enchantment with static enchantment effects. Passive lifegain trigger supports midrange strategies, while activated ability provides utility. The sacrifice cost prevents it from being too repetitive while giving players choices about when to cash it in."}]}
